payload.content: Continued AIegis with email ingestion. Added src/aiegis/email_guard.py and tests/test_email_guard.py, extended CLI with inspect-email, updated README and plan. Capabilities: stdlib email parsing, plain body extraction with Subject/From/To summary, HTML MIME part inspection through html_guard, attachment quarantine, Reply-To mismatch finding, prompt-injection phrase finding, inspect-email JSON audit output. Verification before commit: pytest --cov=aiegis --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 => 24 passed, total coverage 93.19%; ruff check . => all checks passed; mypy src => success no issues in 7 source files. Committed d043edb feat: add email ingestion guard. git status clean on main.

payload.content: Built configurable policy profile layer for AIegis. Added PyYAML dependency, src/aiegis/policy_profiles.py, tests/test_policy_profiles.py, examples/policies.yaml, CLI flags --policy-file and --policy-profile for inspect-html and inspect-email, README docs, plan update. Loader validates YAML strictly: named profiles under profiles, only approval_required_actions and blocked_actions_on_prompt_injection keys, action lists must contain strings. Verification before commit: pytest --cov=aiegis --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 => 29 passed, total coverage 91.86%; ruff check . => all checks passed; mypy src => success no issues in 8 source files. Committed f6d2cfa feat: add configurable policy profiles. git status clean on main.

payload.summary: Added optional metadata-only Zaxy Eventloom audit sink to AIegis with CLI flags --eventloom-log and --eventloom-thread. The sink appends aiegis.policy.decided events using zaxy.event.EventLog when installed, stores hashes/counts/finding metadata/policy decisions only, and avoids raw inspected content or quarantined segments. Verification passed: pytest --cov=aiegis --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 (33 passed, 91.28%), ruff check ., mypy src.

payload.summary: Added a stdlib MCP JSON-RPC stdio server for AIegis. It supports initialize, tools/list, tools/call, exposes aiegis.inspect_html and aiegis.inspect_email, returns structuredContent plus JSON text tool content, handles notifications and parse errors, and is launched with aiegis mcp-stdio. Verification passed: pytest --cov=aiegis --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 (41 passed, 90.69%), ruff check ., mypy src.

payload.summary: Added MCP runtime configuration for policy profiles and Eventloom auditing. McpServerConfig now carries Policy, policy_profile, optional Eventloom log/thread/sink; MCP tool calls evaluate against configured policy and append metadata-only audit events when configured. CLI mcp-stdio now accepts --policy-file, --policy-profile, --eventloom-log, and --eventloom-thread. Verification passed: pytest --cov=aiegis --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 (44 passed, 90.97%), ruff check ., mypy src.
